Russian athletes competed as Olympic Athletes from Russia (OAR) due to doping sanctions; unified Korean team marched together
Postponed one year due to COVID-19 pandemic; only Olympics held in odd-numbered year; held largely without spectators; Russian athletes competed as ROC
First city to host both Summer and Winter Olympics; closed-loop COVID protocols; Russian athletes competed as ROC; Kamila Valieva doping case led to delayed figure skating team medal ceremony
First Olympics with full gender parity in participants; opening ceremony along the Seine; breaking debuted as Olympic sport; Russian athletes competed as Individual Neutral Athletes (AIN)
Most spread-out Winter Olympics ever (Milano, Cortina, Livigno, Predazzo clusters); ski mountaineering debuted; Russian and Belarusian athletes competed as AIN
